subject: NYTimes: Donald Trump News Conference Gets the 'S.N.L.' Treatment
body:
http://www.nytimes.com/2017/01/15/arts/donald- trump-saturday-night-live.html?smprod=nytcore- ipad&smid=nytcore-ipad-share

The actor Alec Baldwin, in a parody of Mr. Trump's first news conference as president-elect, began by vowing to answer what he said was “the question that’s on everyone’s mind.”

Sent from my iPad
